title: aeranthes subramosa
intro: Aeranthes subramosa, also known as the Orchid of the Forest, is a rare and endemic species of flowering plant native to Sri Lanka. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aeranthes subramosa include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, among others. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and powdering the roots and leaves, which can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
